name: ribrewguy-skills
description: Claude Code skills authored and maintained by ribrewguy. Each skill is designed, evaluated, and iterated with the skill-creator workflow.

plugins.name: rest-api-design
plugins.description: HTTP REST API design and review skill with a 4-case eval set covering design-from-scratch, PR audit with severity tags, payments idempotency traps, and bounded-list discipline.

plugins.name: structured-code-review
plugins.description: Rigorous, review-only code review output: source-of-truth-aware preamble, severity-tagged findings (High/Medium/Low), file:line citations, no-findings-still-formal. Composes with domain-review skills like rest-api-design.

plugins.name: task-handoff-summaries
plugins.description: Three rigorous structured report formats: implementation summary (before commit, single-agent or orchestrator), worker handoff summary (multi-agent worker → orchestrator), closeout summary (after completion). Hard rules against using the summary to mask incomplete work.

plugins.name: cross-agent-review
plugins.description: Workflow for routine cross-vendor AI agent peer review (Claude reviews Codex's work, Codex reviews Claude's). Defines the handoff package with self-assessment redacted, the cold-review discipline, the disagreement protocol, the bounded iteration loop. Composes with task-handoff-summaries and structured-code-review.

plugins.name: multi-agent-git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow discipline for multi-agent work — worktree-per-agent topology, orchestrator vs. worker roles, branch hierarchy (main / develop / integration/* / feature/*), merge authority (workers don't merge their own branches), acceptance/rejection rules — plus universal commit discipline (Conventional Commits, task ID required, co-author line, UAT gate ceremony, no silent amends). Composes with task-handoff-summaries.
